steps.t: The láthbear den lies hidden in the valleys of hills east of Faldham, beyond the woods. Inhere believes that the láthbear matrons dwell within a cave,…
Sahard resides at his farm just east of the Faldham mead hall. Sahard awaits at his farmstead for the outcome of your endeavours against the láthbear …
Nothwulf can be found inside the mead hall of Faldham. Nothwulf will be eager to hear the news of the defeat of the láthbear threat.
